meaning: n.复兴,复活,新生,文艺复兴,文艺复兴时期
examples: Popular art is experiencing a renaissance.
The theme of the conference is renaissance Europe.
Italian works reflect the essence of the Renaissance.
It's an approach that echoes the renaissance of vinyl records among hip young aesthetes.
Once a woebegone district characterised by criminal activity and crumbling architecture, Getsemani is undergoing a 21st-century renaissance.
